issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases in the code example or installation instructions.
Only one code example is provided, lacking multiple realistic demonstrations.
Uses curl to download and pipe a shell script from an external source without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: deploy-counter-api
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers most rubric items but uses a different project name, while Response A lacks key elements such as Hono, JSON responses, and deploy commands.

scenarios.name: cron-cleanup-urls
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets the core Deno.cron, KV, and deployctl requirements (though project name differs), while Response A uses Cloudflare Workers instead of Deno.cron and omits the required deployctl command.
